name: KaraCreate
short_description: The world that runs the steam engine. By adsorbing the soul, it turns out that "Karakuri"becomes a life. Researcher Gennai invented the soul and pork driver, and by blending the collected souls with the registrant's soul, he succeeds in creating a "Karakuri" that is attached to the registrant.
detailed_description:
Story

In a world where an invention named Elekiter powers steam engines, studies revealed that Elekiter absorbs certain souls and gives life to machines powered by them.
Many machines-- called "Kikai"-- were created, but some of these Kikais went rogue and out of control.
Following this incident, the researcher Gennai Hiraga invented the Hun-Po/Konpaku Driver, which purpose is to make the collected souls adapt and get used to the registered user's own soul through the Driver, successfully managing to create Kikais friendly and attached to the user.
Nowadays the Driver technology has become common and many machines and laws have come into place, but the story centering around the Kikai have just begun...


You are a young man who wants to study abroad. With my grandfather's soul driver in my hand, I will travel and collect karakuri.

Game system

This game is a Japanese-style role-playing game with maps created in voxels.
You can craft, train, and battle your character.

-Craft function-

Let's craft Karakuri using the collected materials.
Each Karakuri has its own individuality and has various abilities.
Fight against rivals and suspicious organizations and grow your own Karakuri steadily!

-Battle-

The other party is not only the master who manipulates Karakuri, but also the stray Karakuri.
Depending on the battle, special rules may be enforced.
